rulings.Case Title: BARBARA STEPHANS et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Order Granting Leave To File 1st Amended Complt
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, MAY 20, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 1. Plaintiffs' motion for leave to file a first amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: BOBBY FLOYD et al VS. AIR & LIQUID SYSTEMS CORPORATION (SUED
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, MAY 20, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 3. PLAINTIFFS' DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. The court lacks jurisdiction to hear the demurrers per notice of removal filed May 6. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: SAVIDGE VS A P GREEN INDUSTRIES INC *
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, MAY 20, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 4. Defendant Quintec Industries Inc.¿s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is granted. No opposition filed. The complaint was filed in 1994, over 5 years ago. A hearing is required unless defendant¿s counsel advises the plaintiff of the tentative ruling and the plaintiff states that he does not wish to contest the tentative ruling. = (220/HEK)
